suppliers.name: Aurora Cooling Systems Ltd
suppliers.strengths: Mature UK delivery footprint, strong PUE design point, validated SBTi target, longest reference list of comparable Tier III sites.
suppliers.weaknesses: Lighter Scotland engineering presence, 2 deviations from boilerplate liability terms, AI setpoint optimisation still in beta with first customer go-live in September 2026.

suppliers.name: Helios Critical Infrastructure plc
suppliers.trading_country: Republic of Ireland (UK trading entity Helios UK Ltd)
suppliers.tier_certification: Uptime Tier IV (over-spec for Centrica's Tier III+ requirement)
suppliers.strengths: Best-in-class PUE, full UK regional engineering presence including Glasgow and Cardiff, ultra-low GWP refrigerant, accepts Centrica boilerplate verbatim.
suppliers.weaknesses: Highest CapEx by 16%, controls platform is proprietary (concentration risk), 2027 group restructure may absorb a Centrica RFI shortlistee.

suppliers.name: NorthernAir Solutions GmbH
suppliers.trading_country: Germany (UK delivery via NorthernAir UK Ltd)
contract_deviations: Step-in rights limited to 14 days notice
suppliers.strengths: Lowest CapEx, strongest water-stewardship engineering (relevant to Cardiff catchment risk), excellent thermodynamic engineering pedigree, lowest first-year fault density across reference sites.
suppliers.weaknesses: Light UK engineering bench (38 vs Helios 196), 5 contract deviations, refrigerant has GWP just below the regulatory cliff in 2027, SBTi target not yet validated, sub-contracts night-shift response in Cardiff to a third party.
